arts.ttl: Matchday Quiz: Test your Palace & Fulham knowledge!
arts.sum: Crystal Palace and Fulham face off at Craven Cottage on Saturday afternoon (15:00 GMT) – so before the match, it's time to test your knowledge in our weekly matchday quiz, this week complete with leaderboard!

arts.ttl: Fulham star not a priority for club as Arsenal man pushed to front of transfer planning queue
arts.sum: Fulham star Andreas Pereira is not a priority for Flamengo at this moment in time, as they’re focused on finalising a deal to sign Arsenal’s Jorginho. That’s according to Gazeta do Urubu, who say the Mengão board are fully focused on signing the Arsenal man despite the rumours around the Fulham midfielder. arts.ttl: WATCH NOW: Loan Life - Jesurun Rak-Sakyi
arts.sum: The first of Palace TV’s three-part mini-series Loan Life is now LIVE – following the mercurial talent Jesurun Rak-Sakyi during his loan spell at Sheffield United…
